title: Deepgram API keys should not be disclosed
description: Deepgram is an AI speech recognition platform offering real-time and batch transcription, text-to-speech, and audio intelligence. API keys authenticate all Deepgram API calls. Exposing keys allows unauthorized transcription services at your expense and potential access to transcript data.
recommendation: Remove Deepgram API keys from source code. Store in environment variables. Rotate immediately at console.deepgram.com.
impact: Unauthorized speech transcription and text-to-speech generation at your expense, potential access to previously transcribed audio data.

checks.message: Deepgram API key detected in variable assignment. Deepgram API keys provide access to real-time and batch speech transcription, text-to-speech synthesis, and audio intelligence features. Exposing this key enables unauthorized transcription usage billed to your account, access to real-time audio stream transcription, and potential exposure of previously transcribed confidential audio content. Rotate immediately at console.deepgram.com.

Deepgram credential detected near Deepgram keyword. A 40-character alphanumeric string near Deepgram references likely represents a Deepgram API key. Verify and rotate at console.deepgram.com if confirmed.
